name: Freelancer Proposals & Contracts System
description: Complete proposal-to-payment pipeline for freelancers — proposals, contracts, onboarding, invoicing

pages.title: 📋 Proposal Template
pages.content:
# Project Proposal: [PROJECT NAME]

**Prepared for:** [CLIENT NAME]
**Date:** [DATE]
**Valid until:** [DATE + 30 DAYS]

---

## 🎯 Project Overview
[Brief description of what you'll deliver]

## 📐 Scope of Work

### Included:
- [Deliverable 1]
- [Deliverable 2]
- [Deliverable 3]

### Not Included (available as add-ons):
- [Additional service 1] — $[PRICE]
- [Additional service 2] — $[PRICE]

## 📅 Timeline

| Phase | Duration | Deliverables | Date |
|-------|----------|-------------|------|
| Discovery | Week 1 | Requirements doc | [DATE] |
| Design | Week 2-3 | Mockups/wireframes | [DATE] |
| Build | Week 4-6 | Working product | [DATE] |
| Review | Week 7 | Revisions | [DATE] |
| Launch | Week 8 | Final delivery | [DATE] |

## 💰 Investment

| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| [Service 1] | $[AMOUNT] |
| [Service 2] | $[AMOUNT] |
| **Total** | **$[TOTAL]** |

**Payment terms:** 50% upfront, 50% on delivery
**Accepted methods:** Bank transfer, PayPal, Wise

## 📝 Terms & Conditions
1. Two rounds of revisions included
2. Additional revisions at $[RATE]/hour
3. Project timeline starts upon receipt of deposit
4. Client to provide all content/assets by [DATE]
5. Ownership transfers upon final payment

## ✅ Acceptance

By signing below, you agree to the scope, timeline, and investment outlined above.

**Client signature:** _________________ **Date:** _________
**Your signature:** _________________ **Date:** _________

pages.title: 📨 Client Onboarding Checklist
items: ☐ First milestone payment due date set

pages.title: 📚 Contract Clause Library
rows: Any work outside the defined scope will be billed at $[RATE]/hour or require a new proposal.
If client terminates before completion, a kill fee of [X]% of remaining balance is due.
Invoices unpaid after 15 days incur a 2% monthly late fee.
All intellectual property transfers to client upon receipt of final payment.
Includes [X] rounds of revisions. Additional rounds billed at $[RATE]/hour.
Neither party liable for delays caused by circumstances beyond reasonable control.
Freelancer may display completed work in portfolio unless NDA states otherwise.
